serverInfo.name: Justin Fung Portfolio
serverInfo.description: Browser-exposed portfolio context for Justin Fung's public profile, projects, skills, contact links, and resume download.

transports.description: Open the portfolio homepage in a WebMCP-capable browser to access browser-provided context tools.

tools.name: get_portfolio_profile
tools.description: Return Justin Fung's profile, contact links, resume URL, skills, and public project list.

tools.name: list_portfolio_projects
tools.description: Return Justin Fung's public project summaries and source URLs.

tools.name: get_contact_links
tools.description: Return public email, GitHub, LinkedIn, and resume links.
